tagline: Cyber insurance decoded by the agencies who buy it
business_description: An affiliate content site helping digital agency owners understand and compare cyber liability insurance policies. Written from the buyer perspective by a team that has navigated the insurance purchasing process firsthand.
logo_ideas: Shield or lock combined with digital network nodes representing cyber protection. Clean geometric style, works at small sizes. Symbol only, no text.
primary_audience: US/UK digital agency owners with 5-50 employees who need cyber liability insurance but find the market confusing
style_preference: Clean, professional, NerdWallet-inspired. Credibility over creativity.
